item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Crispy saithe fish cakes with silky white wine sauce with dill, butter-browned potatoes and baked courgette, topped with a fine green salad. With fresh herb vinaigrette. (1+2+3+6+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Moroccan lamb tagine braised with seasonal vegetables and dried apricot, served with coarse couscous tossed with herbs and topped with drained yoghurt sprinkled with sweet chilli. With green salad tossed with sumac and lemon. (1+6+13+15) Moroccan mushroom tagine braised with seasonal vegetables and dried apricot, served with coarse couscous tossed with herbs and topped with drained yoghurt sprinkled with sweet chilli. With green salad tossed with sumac and lemon. (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: GREEN DISH: dish

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Thai-marinated, crispy fried chicken with a fiery kick from chilli, soy, sesame and fresh Thai basil, served with steamed rice and crowned with a silky soft fried egg. (1+2+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Pad krapow on pulled, marinated and crispy fried tofu with a fiery kick from chilli, soy, sesame and fresh Thai basil, served with steamed rice and a silky soft fried egg. (1+2+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Chicken marinated in fresh lemon and fragrant rosemary, crispy fried and served with golden roasted potatoes and cool creamy tzatziki on the side. (6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Juicy vegetable patties on beetroot and mushroom, crispy fried and served with golden roasted potatoes and cool creamy tzatziki on the side. (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: North African shakshuka with tender beef and seasonal vegetables, braised in spiced tomato sauce and poached with silky eggs, topped with fresh parsley. Served with crispy wholegrain baguette parissienne, creamy lima bean and spinach hummus and homemade smoked chilli sauce. (1+10+15) GREEN DISH: dish North African shakshuka with pea protein and seasonal vegetables, braised in spiced tomato sauce and poached with silky eggs, topped with fresh parsley. Served with crispy wholegrain baguette parissienne, creamy lima bean and spinach hummus and homemade smoked chilli sauce. (1+10+15)
